set9.desc: Passive scales with Tactician level. Lvl 1: attacks deal bonus damage. Lvl 6: every 3rd attack launches a wave dealing damage and 20% Shred MR for 3s. Lvl 9: every attack launches a farther wave.
Throw a projectile at an enemy for damage, then shield self when it returns.
Channel for 2s reducing incoming damage and healing self; on finish, deal circular AOE damage.
Spin like a beyblade for 4s, dealing circular AOE damage over time.
Send a wave at the clustered enemy; damage falls off per enemy hit. Allies hit are buffed instead.
Leap into the clustered enemy; on landing deal circular AOE damage and Stun.
Laser the current target for 3s, dealing damage over time and shredding MR over time.
Damage the current target and Wound it; the damage is amplified if the target is already Wounded.
Shoot the current target for damage and permanently shred a flat amount of DEF.
Passive: start with +30% bonus HP; when it expires, gain a permanent stacking Attack Speed boost. Active: gain new bonus HP.
Transform to gain bonus max HP, then deal circular AOE magic damage over time. If already transformed, gain more HP and deal a burst.
Strike the current target for heavy physical damage; if it kills the target, immediately recast on a new target.
Throw three daggers at nearby enemies, blink to each, and deal circular AOE magic damage plus Wound to adjacent enemies.
Charge into the largest enemy cluster, dealing physical damage and Stunning enemies in the path. Passive: revive once on death with decaying HP, immune to CC and gaining Attack Speed.

Ionia Bonus: +25 Armor and Magic Resist. Active: enter a defensive stance and gain a Shield that rapidly decays over 3s. When it expires, deal circular AOE magic damage plus 30% of the damage absorbed to enemies around and in front of her.
Ionia Bonus: +25% Attack Damage. Active: take aim at the current target and fire a shot through enemies in a line; each enemy hit reduces the damage by 56%.

Ionia Bonus: +180 max Health. Active: grab an enemy from either side and slam them together, dealing magic damage and Stunning them. If only one enemy is grabbed, the damage and Stun duration are increased by 50%.
Ionia Bonus: +15% Critical Strike Chance and Critical Strike Damage. Active: create a shadow at the furthest enemy within 2 hexes; Zed and his shadow each slash adjacent enemies for physical damage.
Ionia Bonus: +25 Ability Power. Active: fire a burst of energy that explodes on impact, dealing magic damage to enemies adjacent to the target. Every third cast launches 3 bursts.

Ionia Bonus: +8% Damage Reduction. Active: shield self and the 2 lowest-Health allies for 4s. After ally's shield duration expire, Shen's Shield refreshes and burst, dealing magic damage to adjacent enemies.

Ionia Bonus: +15% Omnivamp. Active: send a whirlwind at the furthest enemy within 3 hexes, knocking up and Stunning all enemies hit. Dash to and slash the original target for heavy physical damage, then slam it into the ground, damaging enemies within 1 hex.

Ionia Bonus: +3 Mana per second. Active: steal essence from enemies around the current target, dealing magic damage and Mana Reaving them. Every third cast instead unleashes a wave that damages all enemies hit, dealing 33% more to enemies whose essence has been stolen.
Deal magic damage to adjacent enemies. Heal for the first enemy hit, and a further 30% Ability Power for every additional enemy caught in the same swing.

Passive: whenever ANY enemy is knocked up or back - by anything, not just her - throw a boulder towards them; it damages the first enemy it hits. Active: damage the current target and knock them up, Stunning them for 2s.
Lock on to the farthest enemy and unleash a hail of 6 shots toward them. Each shot damages the first enemy it hits - which need not be the enemy locked on to.
Passive: every third attack, a Sand Soldier damages Azir's target. Active: summon a Sand Soldier to attack the current target; if Azir already has 3 Soldiers, they all strike at once instead.

Steal max Health, Attack Damage, Armor and Magic Resist from the nearest 4/5/7 enemies for 8s - each stat is deducted from them and added to him. While empowered, every third attack deals heavy physical damage.

Heal, then knock up the current target and smash them to the edge of the battlefield, damaging and Stunning them. Enemies the flying target collides with are also damaged and Stunned. If the target cannot be pushed further it is knocked off the battlefield; otherwise K'Sante chases it.
Fire 8 arrows in a cone. Each arrow damages the first enemy it hits and Chills it (-30% Attack Speed) for 2s.
Stun the current target, damage everything within 2 hexes of it, and leave those enemies taking 10% more damage for 4s.
Passive: whenever an ALLY attacks a Chilled enemy, that ally's attack deals bonus true damage. Active: shield self, then damage and Chill nearby enemies.
Shield the lowest-Health ally for 4s, and empower Orianna's NEXT attack to deal bonus magic damage.
Shield self for 4s, then damage enemies within 1 hex of the current target and Sunder them (-20% Armor) for 4s.
Heal for 20% of the damage he took in the last 4s, then strike the current target for magic damage.
Grant himself Attack Speed and his left and right neighbours Ability Power for 3s, then fire a blast that detonates on the first enemy hit, damaging everyone near the blast.
Deal 110/165/250% Ability Power magic damage to the current target. For the rest of combat, Viego's attacks deal 20/30/45% Ability Power bonus stacking magic damage.
Sap Magic: Passive: Whenever an enemy casts an Ability, gain 5 Mana. Active: On his next attack, heal for 220/260/300% Ability Power.

Passive: Attacks impale a spear in the target, which deals 18/27/45% Ability Power true damage when removed. Kalista rips the spears out if it would kill the target. Active: Impale 6 spears in the current target.

Dash around the current target and snip 3 times in a cone, each dealing 100/150/400% Ability Power magic damage to enemies hit. Every 3 casts, gain 120/120/300 Armor and Magic Resist for 3/3/5 seconds.
Fire a massive beam at the furthest enemy, dealing 235/250/2000% Attack Damage physical damage to all enemies hit. Any allies hit gain 200/275/4000% Ability Power Shield for 4/4/15 seconds.

Heal the lowest health ally for 140/160/180% Ability Power. If the ally is below 50% Health, heal them for an additional 140/160/180% Ability Power. Over the next 5 seconds, 5 stars hit the enemy closest to them. Each deals 120/180/280% Ability Power magic damage.
Gain 500/580/680% Ability Power Shield for 4 seconds. It redirects 50% of the damage received by adjacent allies.

Fire a moon blast at the largest group of enemies that deals 240/240/750% Attack Damage physical damage to enemies within 2 hexes. For 7 seconds, equip 3 Chakram, plus 1 more for each enemy hit by the blast. Attacks deal 7/7/15% Attack Damage bonus physical damage for each Chakram equipped. Aphelios heals for 75% of damage dealt by Chakrams (increased by Ability Power).

effects.scale: +1 per enemy hit by the blast
of Chakram damage only; increased by AP

set9.desc: Deal magic damage equal to 12% of the target's max Health (increased by Ability Power) to the lowest Health enemy in range. If this kills them, devour them and permanently gain 35 maximum Health. (Current Bonus: scales with each enemy devoured)
Open two portals near the current target. Destroy 50% of Shields and deal 220/330/500% Ability Power magic damage to all enemies caught between the portals.

Gain 250/300/400% Ability Power Shield for 4 seconds. Deal 160/240/360% Ability Power magic damage to enemies in a cone and Disarm them for 1.5/1.75/2 seconds. Disarm: Cannot move or attack, but CAN cast spells.

Deal 250/250/255% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target and mark them. If they are below 66% max Health, deal true damage instead. If the target is marked, deal 240/240/250% Attack Damage bonus true damage. If this kills the target, rip through them 1 hex and heal for 10% Max Health (increased by Ability Power).

Fire a plasma bolt towards the current target that deals 220/330/550% Ability Power magic damage to the first enemy hit. It then splits in two, dealing 50% less damage whenever it passes through an enemy.
Dash away from all enemies, then fire 15/15/25 missiles split across the 4 nearest enemies. Each missile deals 80/120/240% Ability Power magic damage.
Lash out at the lowest Health enemy in range 6/6/25 times. Each lash deals 85% Attack Damage + 18/30/100% Ability Power physical damage and 2% of the target's max Health as true damage.

Gain 70% Ability Power Attack Speed for 4 seconds. For the duration, attacks explode on impact and deal 60% Attack Damage physical damage to enemies within 1 hex. 4-Star Upgrade: Every 10th attack deals 100% Attack Damage bonus physical damage and ricochets to the largest clump of enemies, dealing 50% of that damage to enemies within 1 hex.

Hurl an explosive heat-seeking mushroom at the current target. When it detonates, enemies within 1 hex are Wounded and dealt 260/390/585% Ability Power magic damage over 3 seconds. 4-Star Upgrade: Increase the explosion radius by 1 hex. Wound: Reduce healing received by 33%
Hurl a grenade towards the largest group of enemies, dealing 150/225/3141% Ability Power magic damage to enemies in a large area and Stunning them for 1.5/2/15 seconds.

Formless Blade: Passive: Attacks strike in a cone, dealing 55/55/100% Attack Damage physical damage to up to 2 additional enemies. Every 3rd attack strikes in a line for 170/175/375% Attack Damage physical damage and grants 18/18/40% stacking Attack Speed.Active: Gain 250/375/700% Ability Power Shield for 3 seconds and dash to a safe location.

X Marks the Spot: Call down an X-shaped rain of bullets, destroying 35% of the target's Shields and dealing 240/360/580% Ability Power magic damage. For 5 seconds, enemies hit have incoming Shields reduced by 35%.

Transform for 10/10/30 seconds, gaining 10% Ability Power Omnivamp and converting 80% of bonus Attack Speed to Attack Damage. While transformed, attacks deal 250/250/2500% Attack Damage physical damage in an area.Omnivamp: Heal for percentage of damage dealt

effects.scale: converts bonus Attack Speed to AD

set9.desc: Shapesplitter: Leap towards the current target and gain 250/325/425% Ability Power Shield for 3 seconds. Slam down after a brief delay, dealing 300/450/700% Ability Power magic damage to enemies within two hexes.

Royal Combo: Dash to strike enemies in a line and deal 255/255/270% Attack Damage + 40/60/90% Ability Power physical damage, empowered by whichever elemental terrain is currently active; Stuns and knocks up the first target hit for 1.5 seconds and all other targets for 0.5 seconds.

Create a portal that coats the ground around the current target in a thicket of vines. After a brief delay, deal magic damage to enemies within, scaling with Ryze's own Armor and Magic Resist (150/200/300% of each), and Stun enemies at the epicenter for 2/2/2.5 seconds with a knockup. Allies within are wrapped in Barkskin, granting bonus Armor and Magic Resist equal to 150/200/300% of Ryze's own for 4 seconds (increased by Ability Power).

effects.scale: of Ryze's own Armor and MR

set9.desc: Fire 5 rockets at random enemies within 2 hexes of the current target. Each rocket deals 150/155/160% Attack Damage + 15/20/35% Ability Power physical damage.
Passive: Attacks heal for 30/35/40% Ability Power.Active: Gain 100% Attack Speed for 2.5 seconds. Then, Stun adjacent enemies for 1.25/1.5/2 seconds.

Passive: Whenever an enemy enters Attack Range, fire a blast from the leg facing that direction that deals 220% Attack Damage + 40/60/500% Ability Power physical damage. Each of Urgot's 6 legs has a 4/4/1 second cooldown.Active: Gain 350/450/1200% Ability Power Shield for 5 seconds and dash behind the current target. Reset all leg cooldowns.

Passive: Execute enemies below 8% max Health (increased by Ability Power). Active: For the next 8/8/15 seconds, attacks chain lightning to 3/3/5 additional enemies, dealing 45/45/100% Attack Damage physical damage.

Undercity Tactics: Throw a vial at the nearest surrounded enemy, covering nearby hexes in chemicals for 6 seconds. Deal 65/100/400% Ability Power magic damage per second to chemical-affected enemies, and heal affected allies for 20/25/120% Ability Power per second. When possible, target unaffected groups.

Smoke Grenade: Launch a smoke grenade toward the current target. It explodes on impact dealing physical damage to adjacent enemies, leaving behind a smoke cloud that Chills for a few seconds. Chill: Reduce Attack Speed by 30%. Damage AD: 200% / 200% / 205%. Damage AP: 30% / 45% / 60%.Damage: AD + AP.Duration: 3 / 3.5 / 4 seconds.
Harsh Lesson: Deal magic damage to the current target, linking souls for 5 seconds. While linked, heal % of all damage taken by the target. Damage: 250% / 375% / 560%. Heal: 25% / 30% / 40%

effects.scale: of all damage the linked target takes

set9.desc: Stacked Deck: Throw a hand of cards at the current target, dealing damage and encircling them. After 1.25 seconds the cards explode, dealing damage to nearby enemies. Initial Damage: 155% / 235% / 380%. Delayed Damage: 185% / 275% / 435%

Riptide: Passive: Gain 40% bonus Armor and Magic Resistance from all sources. Active: Deals magic damage to enemies within two hexes. Knock them up and pull them together, Stunning them for 1.5 seconds. Damage: 150% / 225% / 360%. Stun Duration: 1.5 / 1.5 / 2 seconds

Cutlass Passive: Gain 50 Armor and Magic Resist. Attacks ignite the target, dealing true damage over 2 seconds.Pistol Passive: Gain 3 range. Attacks grant 5 extra mana. Active: Summon the Dreadway to sail across the board, crashing into the first enemy hit and dealing magic damage in a 3-hex radius. Allies the Dreadway passes through or hits with the crash are empowered by citrus, gaining Attack Speed and immunity to crowd control for 3 seconds. Ignite Damage: 250% / 250% / 2500%. Spell Damage: 450% / 675% / 9001%. Attack Speed: 35% / 50% / 300%

Passive: Gain 15% Omnivamp. Active (Eviscerate): Deal physical Damage. Darkin Dagger: After casting, summon packmates that attack the first enemy hit for a total of AD. Eviscerate Damage: 175% / 175% / 180% AD. Omnivamp: 15%. Total Packmate Damage: 190% / 195% / 200% AD

Kick a ball at the current target that deals magic damage and Stuns for 1.5 seconds. The ball bounces to the closest enemy behind the target, dealing magic damage on impact and magic damage to adjacent enemies.Ball Damage: 220% / 330% / 500%.Bounce Damage: 180% / 270% / 400%.Splash Damage: 90% / 140% / 200%

actions.aim: Closest enemy behind Step 1 Aim target

set9.desc: Passive: Attacks deal bonus magic damage, increased while God of Death is active. Active: Gain Shield and 1 range for 5 seconds. Killing enemies in this state steals their Health, Attack Damage, Ability Power, Armor, and Magic Resistance until combat ends. Damage: 100% / 150% / 375%. Empowered Damage: 250% / 375% / 900%. Shield: 40% HealthPercent. Stat Steal: 6% / 6% / 15%.

Blade Waltz: Become untargetable and strike the current target 4 times, prioritizing low-Health targets. Each strike deals 160/160/240% Attack Damage physical damage and 60/90/270% Ability Power true damage. Heal for 15% of the total damage dealt. If the target dies, change targets to the nearest enemy.

Quinn and Valor: Launch Valor through the row or column with the most enemies, marking them to take 10% Ability Power increased damage for 4 seconds. Then rain down arrows, dealing 550/555/565% Attack Damage physical damage split between all marked enemies.

actions.aim: Row or column with most enemies

set9.desc: Featherstrike: Summon 7/7/15 feathers that converge on and pierce the current target, dealing 80/80/100% Attack Damage + 15/25/60% Ability Power physical damage. Each feather removes 6 Armor from the first target it hits until the end of combat.Ionia Bonus: Attacks restore 5 additional Mana.

set10.desc: Deal 300/300/300% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target and adjacent enemies, then Wound them for 5/5/5 seconds. Wound: Reduce healing received by 33%.
Passive: Reduce each instance of incoming damage by 12/15/25% Ability Power.
Gain 10% of Garen's max Health as bonus max Health. Garen's next attack deals 180% Attack Damage plus 10% of Garen's max Health as physical damage.
Throw a blade at the current target that bounces 3/3/3 times, dealing 140/210/315% Ability Power magic damage and applying Wound for 6/6/6 seconds. Wound: Reduce healing received by 33%.
For the next 6 seconds, gain a 250% Attack Damage plus 100/120/140% Ability Power Shield and attacks deal 85% Attack Damage bonus physical damage to her target and enemies within 1 hex of the target.

Passive: Attacks that critically strike grant a stack of Style, up to 6 stacks. Each stack grants 20% Ability Power Attack Speed. Active: Deal 240/240/250% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target, then another 110% Attack Damage physical damage per Style stack. Afterwards, reset Style.

For 8 seconds, convert bonus Attack Speed to Attack Damage. Attacks deal 175/175/180% Attack Damage plus 15/25/40% Ability Power physical damage in a cone and grant Urgot 20% of the damage dealt as a 5 second Shield. If Urgot only hits one target, deal 50% bonus damage.
Fire shots at the 4 furthest enemies. Shots deal 360/360/750% Attack Damage plus 40/60/200% Ability Power physical damage to the first enemy they hit.
Stun the largest group of nearby enemies for 1.75/2/8 seconds and deal 150/225/1200% Ability Power magic damage to each. Thresh heals for 250/300/600 + 50/50/50% of the total damage dealt.
Deal 300/450/675% Ability Power magic damage to the current target and Stun them for 1.25/1.25/1.25 seconds.
Gain a 240/290/330 plus 6% of Taric's max Health Shield for 4 seconds. Taric's next 2 attacks deal 250/375/565% Ability Power bonus magic damage.
Heal 500/575/650 Health over 2/2/2 seconds. Then, deal 190/285/440% Ability Power magic damage to adjacent enemies and Chill them for 3/3/3 seconds. Chill: Reduce Attack Speed by 30%.

Leap at the highest Health enemy within 2/2/2 hexes and deal 230/345/520% Ability Power magic damage to them. Then, deal 140/210/315% Ability Power magic damage to all adjacent enemies. Gain 10/10/10% Attack Damage and Ability Power for the rest of combat.
Fire a beam at the farthest enemy, dealing 250/375/550% Ability Power magic damage to all enemies it hits.

Passive: Deal 100/150/1000% Ability Power magic damage to a nearby enemy every 2/2/2 seconds. Active: Gain a 600/750/2000% Ability Power Shield. For 5/5/5 seconds, Blitzcrank's Passive deals damage every second and deals an additional 1/1/1% of the target's max Health as magic damage.
Throw 21 cards (scales with Attack Speed) divided between the current target and 3 nearest enemies. They reduce Magic Resist by 1 and deal 50/75/225% Ability Power magic damage.
Bounce 3/3/3 times on nearby enemies. Each bounce deals 120/180/1200% Ability Power magic damage, Stuns for 1/1/1 second, and heals Zac for 120/160/800% Ability Power Health.

Mark the current target and spawn an untargetable Shadow with 185/185/370% Attack Damage for 4/4/4 seconds. After a brief delay or when the marked enemy falls below 15% health, deal an additional 350/350/700% Attack Damage physical damage.

Passive: After 4/4/4 casts, gain 40/40/40% Attack Speed and casts deal 80/120/180% Ability Power magic damage to another nearby enemy. Active: Deal 220/330/495% Ability Power magic damage to the current target.

Passive: When attacked, gain 4/4/4 Armor (stacks up to 25/25/25 times). Active: Deal 80/120/190% Ability Power and 150/175/200% Armor magic damage to adjacent enemies. Every 3rd cast hits enemies within 2 hexes and Stuns them for 1.5/1.5/1.5 seconds.
Send a shadow to the current target that Stuns enemies within 1 hex for 1.5/1.5/1.5 seconds. Then, it deals 255/380/610% Ability Power magic damage to enemies within 1 hex.

Passive: Gain Attack Damage equal to 3% of bonus Health. Active: Gain 100 Armor and Magic Resistance for 6 seconds. Hammer the nearest enemy 3 times; each deals 260/260/525% Attack Damage physical damage and heals for 5/5/10% of Poppy's max Health, increased by Ability Power. If this kills an enemy, slam an additional time.
Enter a defensive stance, reducing damage taken by 20% plus 20/20/25% (Ability Power) for 2.5 seconds. Afterwards, deal 999% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target.

Deal 725/725/725% Attack Damage physical damage and Stun the current target for 1.5/1.5/2 seconds. Deal 100/100/100% Attack Damage and Ability Power physical damage to enemies within 1 hex. If the original target dies, Stun enemies within 1 hex for 1/1/1 second.

Gain a 375/425/475 Shield for 2/2/2 seconds, increased by 1/1/1 for every 4/4/4 missing Health. Deal 275/420/680% Ability Power magic damage to the current target and 130/210/340% Ability Power magic damage to enemies in a cone around them.

Gain stacking Move Speed and 8% Ability Power Omnivamp for the rest of combat. Slash twice, dealing 210/210/215% Attack Damage physical damage to enemies in a cone each time. Omnivamp: Heal for percentage of damage dealt.

Blink away from the current target and deal 350/350/700% Attack Damage physical damage to them. Every 3rd cast, deal 350/350/700% Attack Damage plus 80/120/360% Ability Power physical damage to all enemies in a line.

Dash, then deal 400/600/4000% Ability Power magic damage to adjacent enemies and Chill them for 3/3/3 seconds. If Kayn only hits one target, he immediately casts again. Chill: Reduce Attack Speed by 20%.

Fire a bolt toward the current target. It deals 250/375/600% Ability Power magic damage to the first enemy it passes through and 150/225/360% Ability Power magic damage to the second. Every 3rd cast, Stun the 3/3/3 nearest enemies for 1.25/1.25/1.25 seconds and deal 150/225/360% Ability Power magic damage instead.

Throw a bomb at the current target that deals 360/540/4000% Ability Power magic damage. It splits into smaller bombs that Shred their target for 4/4/4 seconds and deal 90/135/500% Ability Power magic damage. Each cast increases the number of smaller bombs by 1/1/1. Shred: Reduce Magic Resist by 30%.

Passive: Every 3/3/3 seconds, Illaoi's tentacles deal 60/60/500% Armor and Magic Resist magic damage to nearby enemies. Active: Gain 100/150/400 Armor and Magic Resist for 3.5 seconds. Revive or fully heal the lowest Health tentacle. Leap at the nearest enemy and deal 100/150/4000% Ability Power magic damage in a large circle 3/3/7 times as tentacles slam in unison.

effects.scale: revive if dead, else full heal

set10.desc: Deal 200/300/450% Ability Power magic damage to the current target. Gain 150/150/150% Attack Speed that decays over 4/4/4 seconds. While active, attacks restore 25/30/35 Health.
Deal 180/270/400% Ability Power magic damage to adjacent enemies. Heal Lillia for 180/220/260% Ability Power and her nearest ally for 90/110/130% Ability Power.

Play a 4/4/4-note tune at random using 3 possible notes: Doot - Deal 200/300/450% Ability Power magic damage to the current target. Chime - Heal the lowest Health ally for 120/150/180% Ability Power Health. Tip - Drop 1/1/1 gold and play another note. (3/3/3 Gold in Hyper Roll).

effects.scale: +1 extra note per Tip (3 Gold in Hyper Roll)

set10.desc: Dash up to 2 hexes and fire a missile at the current target. It deals 290/290/300% Attack Damage plus 40/60/90% Ability Power physical damage to the first enemy hit.
Send a high note to the largest clump of units that hits all units within 1 hex. Enemies take 140/210/315% Ability Power magic damage. Allies heal for 80/120/160% Ability Power Health.

Deal 280/280/290% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target and 180/180/180% Attack Damage physical damage to the closest enemy behind them. If either die, gain 40/40/40% Ability Power Attack Speed for 4/4/4 seconds.

actions.aim: Closest enemy behind Step 1 Aim target

set10.desc: Cosplay the highest Health ally and gain a 250/300/350% Ability Power Shield + 6/6/6% of the ally's Health for 4/4/4 seconds. When it breaks, deal 70/90/115% of its initial value as magic damage to adjacent enemies.

effects.scale: part of the shield scales off the cosplayed ally's Health
of the Step 1 shield's initial value

set10.desc: Blow a kiss at the current target. It deals 275/410/820% Ability Power magic damage and briefly Stuns them. If the target has been kissed before, deal 480/720/1440% Ability Power magic damage instead.

Fire 14 shots toward the furthest enemy. Each shot explodes on the first enemy hit, dealing 60/60/1000% Attack Damage plus 20/30/100% Ability Power physical damage to all nearby enemies and reducing their Armor by 3/5/20 for the rest of combat. If Arpeggio ends early, gain Mana based on the number of unused shots.

effects.scale: Armor, for the rest of combat

set10.desc: Throw a shuriken at the farthest unmarked target, marking them. Dash to every marked enemy, striking them for 190/190/380% Attack Damage physical damage and dealing 80/120/400% Ability Power physical damage to enemies dashed through.

effects.scale: one dash per mark; +1 mark per cast

set10.desc: Throw a shuriken at the farthest unmarked target, marking them. Dash to every marked enemy, striking them for 190/190/380% Attack Damage physical damage and dealing 80/120/400% Ability Power physical damage to enemies dashed through.

effects.scale: one dash per mark; +1 mark per cast

set10.desc: Passive Minigun: Attacks grant 0.04/0.04/0.04% Ability Power Attack Speed. Passive Rocket Launcher: Attacks deal 50/50/50% Attack Damage bonus physical damage. Active: Swap between Minigun and Rocket Launcher.

effects.scale: swaps between Minigun and Rocket Launcher

set10.desc: Deal 330/330/330% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target, or 450/450/450% Attack Damage if they have more current Health than Vi. Stun them for 1.5/1.75/2 seconds and reduce their Armor by 15/18/20% Ability Power for the rest of combat.

effects.scale: Armor, for the rest of combat
Armor, for the rest of combat

set10.desc: Reduce damage taken by 20% plus 25/25/30% (Ability Power) for 2.5 seconds. Afterwards, deal 200% Attack Damage physical damage to the 3 enemies who dealt the most damage to Pantheon during the duration.

Throw a bottle at the current target, which deals 250/250/250% Attack Damage physical damage to enemies within 1 hex. It explodes into 4/4/4 shards; each dealing 35/50/80% Ability Power magic damage to a random enemy within 2 hexes. Each enemy critically struck by the bottle creates 1/1/1 more shard.

effects.scale: +1/1/1 shard per enemy critically struck by the bottle

set10.desc: Passive: Heal 20/25/35% Ability Power Health on attack. For every 1% missing Health, gain bonus Attack Speed that scales with max Health.

Leap over the current target and transform into Mega Gnar for the rest of combat, gaining 500/550/600% Ability Power Health and 70/70/70% Attack Damage. Subsequent casts deal 335/335/335% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target.

Passive: Attacks deal 35/55/80% Ability Power bonus magic damage in waves at the current target and behind them. Active: Deal 240/360/540% Ability Power magic damage to enemies around the target. Shred enemies hit for 4/4/4 seconds. Shred: Reduce Magic Resist by 30/30/30%.

effects.scale: hits the target and enemies behind them

set10.desc: Gain a 500/575/650% Ability Power Shield and deal 220/330/525% Ability Power magic damage to adjacent enemies over 3/3/3 seconds. Afterwards, deal 220/330/525% Ability Power magic damage to nearby enemies. When Face-Melter kills an enemy, gain 4/4/4% Ability Power and Attack Damage, and 4/4/4 Armor and Magic Resist.

Passive: Gain Ability Power based on Critical Strike Chance (scales with Critical Strike Chance). Active: Deal 270/405/900% Ability Power magic damage to the 4/4/6 lowest Health enemies, always critically striking if possible. Gain 40% Ability Power for the rest of combat.

Slam on a nearby hex. Deal 225/225/450% Attack Damage physical damage to enemies within two hexes and mark them for 5/5/5 seconds. Marked enemies take 10/10/10% increased damage from all sources. Viego's attacks on marked enemies deal 10/10/10% Attack Damage physical damage instead.

Summon 9/10/25 headbanging ghouls that pile towards the center of the board. Each deals 150/150/1000% Attack Damage physical damage over three attacks. Ghouls' damage 20% Sunders for 3 seconds. Every other cast also summons a BIG ghoul with 900/1750/9001% Ability Power Health that deals 250/250/2000% Attack Damage physical damage each attack. Sunder: Reduce Armor by 20%
Discharge 2/2/2 Jolts over 2/2/2 seconds. Each Jolt deals 145/215/325% Ability Power magic damage to a random enemy within range and Stuns them for 0.75/0.75/0.75 seconds.
Passive: Yasuo permanently gains 1.5% Attack Damage when he kills an enemy champion (doubled in Hyper Roll). Active: Deal 280% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target.
Fire a blast of sound at the current target's location. It pulses 3/3/3 times, each dealing 105/155/225% Ability Power magic damage to enemies within 1/1/1 hex.
Deal 60/90/145% Ability Power magic damage to enemies within 2 hexes and Stun them for 1/1/1 seconds. Gain a 400/450/550% Ability Power Health shield for 4/4/4 seconds.

Passive: Attacks generate 10/10/10 additional Mana. If your bench has 4/4/4 Grand Finale Rifles, begin conducting instead of attacking. Each Rifle fires at the same rate as the Maestro and deals 60/60/444% Attack Damage physical damage. Every 4th volley deals 200/200/200% damage. Active: Put 1/1/4 Grand Finale Rifle into one of your empty bench slots.

effects.scale: each Rifle fires at the Maestro's attack rate; he conducts instead of attacking
of the Rifle volley damage — every 4th volley
a Grand Finale Rifle, into an empty bench slot

set10.desc: Copy 1 of the current target's items and throw them to an ally. Deal 470/470/1000% Attack Damage physical damage and knock them back. If the target had no items, deal 200% Attack Damage plus 60/60/500% Ability Power additional true damage and knock them back to the edge of the board instead.

effects.scale: copied from the enemy Qiyana hit
